mechanism: Inhibits RAF kinases and FLT3, suppressing FLT3-ITD–driven signaling and proliferation
additional_notes: Highly protein-bound; strong single-agent activity in FLT3-ITD AML (e.g., MOLM-13/MV4-11)

mechanism: Potent ABL/FLT3 inhibitor active against FLT3-ITD and resistant FLT3 mutants
additional_notes: Active on FLT3-ITD and various resistant FLT3 mutants

mechanism: Inhibits MET, VEGFR2, and FLT3 signaling pathways
additional_notes: Demonstrated activity in FLT3-ITD AML models (MOLM-13/MV4-11)

mechanism: Blocks multiple receptor tyrosine kinases including FLT3, VEGFR, and PDGFR
additional_notes: Reported activity across AML lines including FLT3-ITD models

mechanism: Inhibits multiple kinases including FLT3, VEGFRs, and others
additional_notes: Active in FLT3-ITD AML models though less potent than dedicated FLT3 TKIs

category: SRC/ABL tyrosine kinase inhibitor (some FLT3 activity)
mechanism: Inhibits SRC/ABL family kinases; exhibits inhibitory activity in FLT3-driven contexts
additional_notes: Shows activity in MOLM-13; sometimes enhanced in combinations

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR, PDGFR and other kinases; indirect/weak activity vs FLT3
additional_notes: Generally weaker single-agent potency versus dedicated FLT3 inhibitors

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase leading to elevated ROS and oxidative stress–mediated apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; strong activity reported in MOLM-13

mechanism: Blocks mitochondrial protein synthesis, impairing oxidative phosphorylation and leukemia cell survival
additional_notes: Selective impact on leukemia cells’ mitochondrial dependency

mechanism: Inhibits 26S proteasome leading to accumulation of misfolded proteins and apoptosis
additional_notes: Potent activity in FLT3-ITD AML lines (MOLM-13/MV4-11)

mechanism: Inhibits translation elongation, depleting short-lived oncoproteins
additional_notes: Also known as homoharringtonine (HHT)

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling, reducing survival signaling in FLT3-ITD AML
additional_notes: Repurposed for STAT5 pathway inhibition in AML models

mechanism: Blocks JAK-STAT signaling downstream of cytokine receptors
additional_notes: Often shows stronger effects in combinations in AML contexts

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to suppress MAPK/ERK signaling
additional_notes: Single-agent sensitivity in MOLM-13 is modest; enhanced activity in combinations or RAS/MAPK-activated contexts

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases leading to chromatin relaxation and apoptosis
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; reported activity in MOLM-13

mechanism: Potent pan-HDAC inhibition causing transcriptional reprogramming and apoptosis
additional_notes: Highly potent across AML lines including MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Induces oxidative stress and mitochondrial damage; multiple cellular targets
additional_notes: Non-APL AML shows activity; often synergistic with FLT3 inhibitors

mechanism: Blocks mevalonate pathway and protein prenylation, impairing oncogenic signaling
additional_notes: Lovastatin shows similar activity; potency can be reversed by mevalonate rescue

mechanism: Disrupts Wnt/β-catenin and STAT3 signaling and uncouples mitochondrial oxidative phosphorylation
additional_notes: Demonstrated activity in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Disrupts lysosomal function and signaling, affecting leukemia stem/progenitor cells
additional_notes: Reported activity against leukemia stem/progenitor populations
